published_prior_art.cite: AtheyImbens2006 and CallawayLi2019 supply the two counterfactual maps; the local equality bridge is routine and not a flagship novelty.

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_dist_synth_control_v1: DiSCo/copula taxonomy, not staggered CIC--Callaway--Li equality frontier.

published_prior_art.cite: AtheyImbens2006 + CallawayLi2019 + LiLin2024 are closest; none states this staggered iff frontier.

repo_prior_art.cite: q_did_drdid_ipwdid_frontier_v1 and panel_sdid_mc_id_v1 are mean/SC estimator frontiers, not nonlinear QTT sign wedges.

published_prior_art.cite: GoodmanBacon2021, SunAbraham2021, and deChaisemartinDHaultfoeuille2020 are mean-DID diagnostics and do not subsume quantile-CDF sign reversal.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: Misses KimWooldridge2025, a closer QTT-DID comparator that directly contrasts a QTT estimator with CIC and states an iff common-time-effect condition; it likely does not subsume the staggered CIC--CL frontier but must be discussed.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The timing-skew moment is not well-posed as a nonzero panel quantity: omega_{h|g,t}=Pr(G=h|G in R_{g,t}) and the baseline omega^0 over the same fixed risk-set cohorts coincide in the stated balanced panel law, making M identically zero.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The §9 witness requires current weights (1/2+eta,1/2-eta) and baseline weights (1/2,1/2), which cannot both arise from the fixed-G risk-set definition; even ignoring that, the displayed formula does not yield M=2a eta under the stated summand.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Coincidence of local transports only on I_tau supports at most a local tau-quantile equality, not equality of the full CDFs at every continuity point.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Redefine omega and omega^0 as genuinely distinct observable timing weights, or remove the timing-skew moment; then recompute the T=3 witness from the revised definition.
Weaken Theorem 1 to tau-local equality, or require global transport coincidence for all ranks before claiming full CDF equality.
Add Kim--Wooldridge (2025, JBES) as a location-anchored comparator and state why its common-CDF-time-effect QTT estimator does not cover the staggered CIC--Callaway--Li frontier.
After fixing the timing-weight object, give a finite-support table of atom probabilities and quantiles for the non-corner sign-wedge witness rather than only median-change summaries.

recommended_next_step: Reject this version; redraft the timing-skew definition, the witness algebra, and the two-period theorem before rerunning novelty review.
